meta.title: Juice Mobile — Charge your phone. Earn real tokens.
meta.description: Human Activity DePin on Solana. Every minute charging your phone earns verifiable JUICE tokens on-chain. Built at Frontier Colosseum.
meta.keywords: DePin, human activity, Solana, Juice Mobile, blockchain, rewards, charging, on-chain proof, Frontier hackathon

hero.subtitle: Turn charging time into valuable points.

partnersTrust.title: Backed by names you already trust
partnersTrust.subtitle: Global exchanges and crypto infrastructure backing the JUICE token.

features.title: Decentralized physical infrastructure that pays you
features.subtitle: Real energy turning into real rewards, proof by proof, on-chain.

charging.title: Charging that pays
charging.description: Points per charging minute, with a bonus on every full hour. Every kWh counts.

proof.title: On-chain proof
proof.description: Each session is signed and recorded on Solana. Pseudonymous on-chain via salted hash, no black box.

ranking.title: Weekly ranking
ranking.description: The most active users of the week share an extra JUICE pool. Real competition.

token.title: JUICE Token SPL
token.description: Native SPL token on Solana mainnet. DEX liquidity, transferable, real.

referral.title: Referral system
referral.description: +100 JUICE per friend signed up. Grow with your network, earn together.

depin.title: Real DePIN
depin.description: Every reward is backed by a verified charging minute. Useful work.

community.title: Join our community
community.subtitle: More than an app, we are a community. Join thousands of people already earning JUICE and sharing crypto experiences.

howItWorks.title: Start earning in less than a minute
howItWorks.subtitle: No heavy KYC, no upfront investment, no special hardware. Just the cable that's already there.

step1.label: Step 01
step1.title: Plug in the charger
step1.description: Plug your phone in like you always do. The app automatically detects when charging starts.

step2.label: Step 02
step2.title: Accumulate verified points
step2.description: Every minute, +10 JUICE are accumulated and the session is signed for on-chain proof.

step3.label: Step 03
step3.title: Redeem your JUICE
step3.description: Once you reach the minimum balance, redeem JUICE tokens to your Solana wallet or trade on DEXs.

hackathon.title: Built at Frontier Colosseum
hackathon.description: Juice Mobile competes in Frontier Colosseum as an energy DePIN solution. On-chain charging proof, SPL token on mainnet, built for the Brazilian and Latin American market.

token.title: JUICE Token
token.subtitle: The utility token that powers the Juice network. Distributed by charging proof, transferable, with real liquidity.

founder.name: Rafael Mariano
founder.bio1: Securities Investment Analyst (CNPI), Helicopter Pilot, educator, entrepreneur, and developer of innovative solutions in financial markets and crypto. With experience at XP Inc., Rico and Terra Investimentos, he was honored as one of the most influential teachers in his region by SENAI.
founder.bio2: Developer and programmer, Rafael combines technology with transformative skills, making a difference in the lives of thousands of people.
founder.alt: Rafael Mariano, founder and CEO of Juice Mobile

cofounder.name: Carol Uchoas
cofounder.alt: Carol Uchoas, commercial at Juice Mobile

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Juice Mobile.

waitlist.title: Be the first to know when JUICE token launches
waitlist.subtitle: Early access, community drops, and hackathon news straight to your inbox.

footer.downloadSubtitle: Available now on the App Store and Google Play. iOS and Android.

hero.title: The fuel of the JUICE ecosystem
hero.subtitle: $JUICE is the native Solana token that tokenizes every minute of charging. Deflationary by design, with real utility and community governance.

overview.title: Token parameters
overview.subtitle: Everything you need to know about $JUICE in one table.

distribution.title: How the supply is allocated
distribution.subtitle: Each slice is clickable — tap to see allocation details.

community.label: Community Rewards
community.note: Distributed across ~10 years via halving curve to app users. The organic growth engine of the ecosystem.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem & Partnerships
ecosystem.note: Reserved for ecosystem grants, integrations with other DePINs and strategic sponsorships. Released by DAO proposal.

team.label: Team & Advisors
team.note: Team and advisors. 12-month cliff followed by 36 months of linear vesting to align long-term incentives.

treasury.label: DAO Treasury
treasury.note: Treasury controlled by the DAO. Used for future emissions, bounties, security audits and initiatives decided in governance.

liquidity.label: Liquidity
liquidity.note: Initial pools on Raydium and Orca. LP tokens locked for 24 months to guarantee market depth at launch.

airdrop.label: Retroactive Airdrop
airdrop.note: Reward for users who supported the ecosystem before TGE. Distributed based on a snapshot of accumulated points.

private.label: Private Sale
private.note: Closed strategic round. Linear vesting over 24 months, no cliff, to avoid sell pressure at listing.

public.label: Public Sale / IDO
public.note: Public sale via partner launchpad. No lock — promotes fair price discovery on day one with a small, controlled float.

emission.title: Emission with halving
emission.subtitle: Inspired by Bitcoin halving. Decaying yearly pool, distributed proportionally among active users each quarter. No inflation as the user base grows.

claim.title: How the claim works
claim.subtitle: Self-balancing — fixed supply, proportional share. No death spiral as the base grows.

pool.label: Fixed pool per quarter
pool.body: Y1 = 200M $JUICE ÷ 4 = 50M per quarter. Deterministic halving curve — doesn't move with adoption.

earn.label: You accumulate points
earn.body: 1 minute charging = 10 pts. +50 per full hour. +100 per referral. Each session is validated on-chain.

share.label: Your share = proportional
share.body: (your points ÷ network total this quarter) × pool. More active users = your slice gets smaller — emitted supply stays fixed.

redeem.label: On-chain claim
redeem.body: At quarter end you claim your $JUICE straight to wallet. Or keep accumulating for the next one.

utility.title: What $JUICE is for
utility.subtitle: Five real utilities — not an empty governance token.

withdraw.title: Fee-free withdrawals
withdraw.body: Withdraw in $JUICE: 0% fee. Withdraw in PIX: 5% — 50% burned, 50% to the treasury.

boost.title: Mining Boost
boost.body: Stake $JUICE to multiply points per minute. Bronze (1k) 1.2x · Silver (10k) 1.5x · Gold (100k) 2x.

nft.title: Charger NFTs
nft.body: Charger skins and boosters as Solana cNFTs. Permanent multiplier, mint cost in cents.

dao.title: DAO Governance
dao.body: Holders vote on emissions, app parameters, new partnerships and treasury usage.

marketplace.title: Rewards marketplace
marketplace.body: Power banks, gift cards and electronics paid in $JUICE — discounted vs. fiat price.

burn.title: Programmed burn
burn.subtitle: $JUICE isn't only distributed — it's also taken out of circulation in a transparent, auditable way.

staking.title: Real Yield, no inflationary APY
staking.subtitle: Stakers receive a share of real fees generated by the app — paid in USDC or $JUICE, the staker's choice.

converter.title: App points convert to $JUICE
converter.subtitle: The conversion rule is simple and fixed — no fine print.

whySolana.title: Why Solana
whySolana.subtitle: Tokenizing every minute of charging at scale is only viable on a chain like Solana.

fees.title: $0.0001 fees
fees.body: Make it economically viable to tokenize every minute without eating the user's reward.

compression.title: ZK Compression
compression.body: Light Protocol compresses each user's on-chain account with Merkle proofs — creation cost drops ~5000×, making one account per charger viable at millions of users.

cnft.title: cNFTs
cnft.body: Compressed NFTs allow millions of charger skins for cents.

depin.title: DePIN ecosystem
depin.body: Neighbors with Helium, Hivemapper, Render — real composability between physical networks.

wallet.title: Phantom Wallet
wallet.body: Native mobile-first wallet, UX that matches our smartphone audience.

roadmap.title: Launch roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: From whitepaper to live marketplace in 6 months.

faq.title: Quick FAQ
faq.subtitle: The most common $JUICE questions — one sentence each.

items.a: We're on track for TGE in ~6 months. Exact dates depend on the contract audit and snapshot. Join the community to be notified first.

items.q: Will I lose my current points?
items.a: No. Accumulated points are preserved and converted to $JUICE at the rate of 1,000 points = 1 $JUICE at snapshot time.

items.q: Do I need a wallet to keep using the app?
items.a: No. You can keep using the app with points only. The wallet is needed only if you want to withdraw $JUICE, stake or shop in the marketplace.

items.q: Is the token regulated in Brazil?
items.a: $JUICE is a utility token — not a security, investment offering or yield promise. We address compliance proactively with local counsel.

items.q: How do I qualify for the airdrop?
items.a: Use the app before snapshot (announced at least 30 days in advance). The more points accumulated by that date, the larger your retroactive allocation.

tokenomics.disclaimer: $JUICE is a utility token of the JUICE ecosystem. It is not a security, investment offering or financial return promise. Crypto involves risks. Always consult local regulation.

finalCta.title: Join the community before TGE
finalCta.subtitle: Active community holders get priority on the airdrop, IDO whitelist and NFT drops.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
body: Juice Mobile is committed to protecting the privacy of our users.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing
body: We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: 5. Security
body: Your data is stored with encryption in transit and at rest.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
body: Access, correction, and deletion of your data. Contact: contato@criptonobolso.com.br

sections.heading: 7. Apple Compliance
body: This App complies with Apple App Store guidelines and App Tracking Transparency (ATT).

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
body: By accessing and using the Juice Mobile application ("App"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
body: Juice Mobile is a gamified application that rewards users with virtual points for accessing the app daily.
Juice Mobile points DO NOT have real monetary value and do not constitute any form of investment.

sections.heading: 3. Eligibility
body: You must be at least 13 years old to use the App.

sections.heading: 4. User Account
body: To use the App, you must create an account using authentication via Google or Apple.

sections.heading: 5. Usage Rules
items: Do not use the App for illegal purposes
Do not attempt to manipulate the points system
Do not improperly create multiple accounts
Do not use bots or automated tools

sections.heading: 6. Points and Ranking
body: Points are awarded exclusively as a form of gamification. We reserve the right to modify the system at any time.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
body: All App content is the exclusive property of Juice Mobile.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
body: The App is provided "as is". We are not responsible for damages arising from the use of the App.

sections.heading: 9. Modifications
body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
body: contato@criptonobolso.com.br

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help? Get in touch with our team.
support.emailDescription: For questions, suggestions, or technical issues:

items.a: Just open the app once a day to receive 10 points.
No. Points are exclusively for entertainment and ranking purposes.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: Send an email to contato@criptonobolso.com.br.

items.q: Does the app collect sensitive data?
items.a: No. Only basic profile information via Google or Apple.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know about Juice Mobile.

items.a: A DePIN app that rewards you with JUICE tokens for every minute of charging verified on-chain on Solana.
Plug in the charger and open the app. Every charging minute, +10 JUICE accumulate, with a +50 bonus on every full hour.

items.q: Do I need a Solana wallet?
items.a: Not for daily app use. To redeem JUICE tokens to your own wallet, yes — any Solana wallet works.
Yes. Your charging is monitored locally, and each verified session is signed and submitted to Solana as proof.
We're at hackathon stage. Sign up for the waitlist to be notified.

copyright.title: Copyright & Intellectual Property

sections.heading: 1. Ownership
body: The Juice Mobile application is the exclusive property of Cripto no Bolso, São Paulo, Brazil. Protected by Brazilian Law No. 9,610/98 and Law No. 9,279/96.

sections.heading: 2. Legal Compliance
items: Brazilian Internet Civil Framework — Law No. 12,965/2014
Apple App Store and Google Play guidelines

sections.heading: 3. Restrictions
items: Reproduction, distribution, or modification of any part of the application is prohibited
Reverse engineering or decompilation is prohibited
Use of the brand on third-party products is prohibited

sections.heading: 4. Contact
body: Cripto no Bolso — contato@criptonobolso.com.br

copyright.closing: © 2026 Juice Mobile — Cripto no Bolso. All rights reserved.

deleteAccount.title: Delete my account

sections.heading: 1. Overview
body: You can request deletion of your Juice Mobile account at any time. This page describes how to request it, what gets deleted, and what may be retained as required by law.

sections.heading: 2. Delete from the app
body: The fastest way is to delete directly from the app:
items: Open the Juice Mobile app on your phone.
Your account is disabled immediately and personal data is removed within 30 days.

sections.heading: 3. Delete by email
body: If you no longer have access to the app, send a deletion request from your registered email to contato@criptonobolso.com.br with the subject "Account deletion request — Juice Mobile". We acknowledge the request within 7 business days and complete deletion within 30 days.

sections.heading: 4. Data we delete
items: Preferences, device identifiers and personal usage logs

sections.heading: 5. Data we may retain
body: Some records may be kept after deletion to comply with legal and security obligations:
items: On-chain JUICE transactions already executed — public and immutable on the Solana network, outside of our control
Financial and tax records required by Brazilian law
Anonymous security logs for up to 12 months to prevent fraud

sections.heading: 6. Important notices
body: Deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed. Unredeemed points are forfeited. JUICE tokens already sent to your Solana wallet remain yours — outside of our control. We recommend redeeming any pending balance before requesting deletion.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
body: Cripto no Bolso — contato@criptonobolso.com.br

deleteAccount.closing: © 2026 Juice Mobile — Cripto no Bolso. All rights reserved.

parceiros.title: Partners
parceiros.intro: Connect your brand to a DePIN network with on-chain proof — sponsored missions, native banners, and token integrations on Solana.

hero.headlineLine1: Your brand, in the daily routine
hero.subtitle: Juice Mobile is Brazil's first Human Activity DePIN. Every minute of usage is on-chain proof. Place your brand inside sponsored missions, native banners, and token integrations — and measure outcomes by completion, not by impression.
hero.partnerStampHint: Exchange partner on the JUICE token journey

kpi.title: Active, on-chain audience — and growing
kpi.subtitle: The numbers that matter to sponsors. Updated each release.
kpi.disclaimer: Numbers updated each release. Detailed metrics (cohorts, geographic breakdown, traffic sources) available under NDA.

audience.title: Not generic audience. Daily habit, wallet in hand.
audience.subtitle: Each user signed up, opened the app, and triggered on-chain proof. A quality filter no ad network delivers.

mobile.title: Mobile-first
mobile.description: 100% on-phone. Sessions begin with the charger cable. Real attention, not passive scrolling.

sustainable.title: Energy-aware
sustainable.description: Juice users think about their energy use. Green brands, EV, urban mobility, and energy speak directly to them.

web3.title: On-chain savvy
web3.description: Active Solana wallet, comfortable with tokens, open to new protocols. Crypto needs no introduction.

urban.title: Young & urban
urban.description: 18–45, predominantly in capital cities. Mid/upper income, high willingness to try new products.

offerings.title: How your brand shows up
offerings.subtitle: Pick a format or combine several. End-to-end measurement with optional on-chain proof.

missions.title: Sponsored Missions
missions.description: Your brand briefs a mission (e.g., visit a store, try the app, share content). The user completes it, gets JUICE + your reward, and you measure by real completion.
missions.example: E.g., "Visit charging station X" → +500 JUICE + brand coupon

banners.title: Native In-App Banners
banners.description: Placement inside the feed — no pop-ups, no interruptions. CPM or CPC pricing, with profile-based targeting.
banners.example: E.g., sponsored card between missions, with up to 2 CTAs

cashback.title: Cashback / Pay in JUICE
cashback.description: Your brand accepts JUICE as payment (auto-converted to BRL via partner gateway) or issues JUICE cashback for off-app actions.
cashback.example: E.g., customer pays for coffee, gets 5% back in JUICE

geo.title: Geo-fenced Campaigns
geo.description: Missions and banners triggered by location. Ideal for physical retail, gas stations, events, and IRL activations with foot-traffic measurement.
geo.example: E.g., user enters a 200m radius → mission fires

loyalty.title: Loyalty Bridge
loyalty.description: Connect your loyalty program to Juice. User burns brand points, earns JUICE. Reverse: spend JUICE, earn your points. Cross-loyalty.

irl.title: IRL Brand Activations
irl.description: Co-branding at meetups, hackathons, festivals, and street activations. Juice Mobile + Superteam Brazil + your brand, with integrated digital coverage.
irl.example: E.g., co-branded booth at a Solana hackathon

flow.title: From briefing to reward in 4 steps
flow.subtitle: Human curation, automated execution, on-chain measurement.

brief.label: Step 01
brief.title: Brand briefing
brief.description: You define objective, audience, format (mission/banner/integration), region, and budget. 30-min call.

curate.label: Step 02
curate.title: Juice curation
curate.description: Our team designs the mechanics, validates compliance, and prepares the in-app mission. Shared approval before go-live.

deliver.label: Step 03
deliver.title: Mission live
deliver.description: Users see, complete, and receive JUICE on-chain + your brand reward. Real time.

measure.label: Step 04
measure.title: Report + payment
measure.description: Dashboard with completion rate, completer profile, unit cost, and on-chain proof. Pay by invoice or in JUICE.

cases.title: Partners who already use the App
cases.subtitle: Real community, real partnership, real proof.
cases.affiliateDisclosure: The partnership links above include affiliate programs — Juice Mobile may earn a commission on signups and transactions made through these links, at no extra cost to you.

bingx.name: BingX
bingx.description: Global exchange partner of Juice Mobile and Official Crypto Exchange Partner of Chelsea FC. Liquidity, infrastructure, and international reach for the JUICE token.

okx.name: OKX
okx.description: OKX is Juice Mobile's partner in the crypto ecosystem — a global leading exchange and creator of X Pay, the end-to-end crypto payments platform.

kast.name: KAST
kast.description: KAST partners with Juice Mobile on a Visa Platinum crypto card — taking on-chain balance into everyday payments, aligned with JUICE's mission.

kaxis.name: Kaxis Club
kaxis.description: Kaxis is the Brazilian neobank built on Solana — account, card and crypto in one app, aligned with JUICE's mission to bring Web3 into real everyday life.

solflare.name: Solflare
solflare.role: The most powerful wallet on Solana
solflare.description: Solflare is the most powerful wallet on Solana — native staking, swap and NFTs. A natural fit for users earning JUICE points who want secure self-custody.

mind.name: Mind Protocol
mind.description: Mind Protocol turns Solana into the agent-to-agent (A2A) settlement layer — infrastructure for the next generation of automated on-chain payments.

tiers.title: Partnership models
tiers.subtitle: Starter packages — every partnership is customizable. Negotiate via the form.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know before signing.

items.a: By default, payment in BRL via monthly invoice. On Growth and Enterprise plans we can receive in JUICE with auto-conversion. User rewards always go out as JUICE on-chain.

items.q: How long until the mission goes live?
items.a: From approved briefing to live mission: 7–14 days. Depends on mechanic complexity and compliance review.
Dashboard with completion rate, sessions, demographic profile of completers, unit cost, and on-chain proof of rewards paid. Consolidated report at the end of each cycle.
On Enterprise, yes — negotiable per category and region. On Pilot and Growth, we operate non-exclusive but guarantee no competitor on the same day.
Every partnership goes through LGPD and Consumer Protection review before go-live. Minimal data collection, explicit user opt-in, region-specific contracts.
Pilot is 30 days. Growth, 90 days. Enterprise, 12 months. Always with the option to upgrade between tiers during the cycle.

items.q: How do I approve the mission before it goes live?
items.a: We share a draft via Notion or Figma; you approve or request changes. It only goes live with written approval from the brand.

items.q: Who runs the partnership on my side?
items.a: Pilot and Growth are managed by the Juice team directly. Enterprise includes a dedicated Account Manager with a 4-business-hour response SLA.

contact.title: Ready to build together?
contact.subtitle: Drop me an email with the idea. I reply myself — no SDR filter, no form queue. Initial response within 24 business hours.
